meta.title: Cert Bundle Schema
meta.description: Certification records that validate shard integrity, conservation, or replay fidelity.

required_fields.checks_passed: list[str] — which specific checks this cert covers
required_fields.trace_hash: str | null — SHA256 of replay trace if cert_type is REPLAY

cert_types.STRUCTURAL: Verifies shard has valid ID, required fields, consistent seed_vector, resolvable payload_ref
cert_types.CONSERVATION: Verifies all 6 conservation laws hold in the shard's edge neighborhood
cert_types.REPLAY: Verifies a replay bundle reproduces the shard's content deterministically
cert_types.PROMOTION: Issued when a shard is promoted; records the governance decision
